name: Observation
description: Operational learning signal — captures friction, surprises, methodology insights, and quality observations from knowledge processing.

global.schema:
enum ObservationCategory {
    METHODOLOGY
    PROCESS
    FRICTION
    SURPRISE
    QUALITY
}

enum ObservationStatus {
    PENDING
    PROMOTED
    IMPLEMENTED
    ARCHIVED
}

type ObservationState {
    title: String
    description: String
    content: String
    category: ObservationCategory
    status: ObservationStatus
    observedAt: DateTime
    observedBy: String
    promotedTo: String
    promotedAt: DateTime
}
global.initialValue:
{
    "title": null,
    "description": null,
    "content": null,
    "category": null,
    "status": "PENDING",
    "observedAt": null,
    "observedBy": null,
    "promotedTo": null,
    "promotedAt": null
}

operations.name: CREATE_OBSERVATION
operations.schema:
input CreateObservationInput {
    title: String!
    description: String!
    content: String
    category: ObservationCategory!
    observedAt: DateTime!
    observedBy: String
}

operations.name: PROMOTE_OBSERVATION
